Corpus cavernosum and spongiosum ducts that carry milk from the mammary glands to the nipple 7. Labia major pigmented area around the nipple 8. Seminiferous tubules the larger outer folds of the vulva surrounding the inner folds; contain adipose tissue and hair 9. Ovaries erectile tissues that form the bulk of the penis 10. Lactiferous ducts small fingerlike projections at the end of the fallopian tubes 4. What is unique about the location/position of the kidneys? (0.5 point) 146 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK
